nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
The image is a composite of two distinct sections: a photographic portrait and a collection of nine headshots. The portrait occupies the right half of the image, showcasing a woman with fair skin and light brown hair styled in a loose, side-parted manner. She has a neutral expression with a hint of a smile, and her makeup is minimal, accentuating her natural features. She wears a black top.

The left half of the image features a grid of nine headshots arranged in three rows and three columns. Each headshot captures the same woman portraid in the right half, focusing on her facial expressions and features. The headshots display a range of expressions from neutral to slightly pensive, emphasizing her delicate facial structure, light brown hair, and fair complexion. The background in each headshot is a muted gray, providing a neutral backdrop that highlights her face.

The overall style of the composite image is professional and polished, likely used for a portfolio or a character study. The use of similar lighting and composition across all headshots ensures consistency and clarity, providing a comprehensive visual representation of the woman.
a photo portrait of a girl with a perfect smooth round chin and blue detailed eyes
a portrait of a beautiful girl with perfect detailed skin

nodes.title: Links to models and LoRA used in the workflow
widgets_values:
***Skin Lora***
https://civitai.com/models/580857/realistic-skin-texture-style-xl-detailed-skin-sd15-flux1d

***Chin fixer Lora***
https://civitai.com/models/775002/chin-fixer-2000

***LUT's model files***
(save in folder: "/models/luts/")
https://huggingface.co/Tenofas/ComfyUI/tree/main/luts
you can find more free LUT's here:
https://www.freepresets.com/product-category/free-luts-color-lookup-table/

***ULTRALYTICS files*** 
(save in folder: "/models/ultralytics/bbox/")
Eyes.pt and face_yolov8m.pt
https://huggingface.co/Tenofas/ComfyUI/tree/main/ultralytics/bbox

***Upscale model files*** 
(save in folder: "/models/upscale_models/")
4xUltrasharp_4xUltrasharpV10.pt (first pass)  and  4xRealWebPhoto_v4_dat2.pth  (second pass) 
https://huggingface.co/Tenofas/ComfyUI/tree/main/upscale_models

***Pulid model files*** 
(save in folder: "/models/pulid/")
Suggested v.0.9.1
https://huggingface.co/Tenofas/ComfyUI/tree/main/pulid

***FLUX models files***
https://comfyanonymous.github.io/ComfyUI_examples/flux/
Required models:
1) flux1-def model
2) flux1-fill-dev model
3) flux1-redux-dev model and sigclip_vision_patch14_384

nodes.title: Hot to use the workflow
widgets_values:
1) Load the Primary Image (portrait you want to Replicate) and a 3x3 Grid image (as suggested above).

2) Select if you want a random or fixed Seed, the Redux and PuLID strength, the number of steps,  the sampler and scheduler you want to use (my suggestion is Deis - Ddim_uniform). (In the green group "Workflow Settings.)

3) You can change the upscale models used in the Upscale 1st and 2nd pass if you like.

Face Enhacer part of the workflow:

1) Select the skin detail lora and its strength (default is "skin texture style v.5 lora with 0.75 strength).

2) You can modify the Lying Sigma Sampler's dishonesty-factor (default -0.05) and the start/end percent (default 0.15 / 0.85) for stronger/weaker skin details.

3) In the Chin Masking (step 2) check if all 9 the chins are detected (if not, try changing the Layer Mask threshold (default 0.35).

4) Select the chin fixer lora and its strength (default is "chifixer-2000 with strength 2.00).

5) Select what postproduction modules you want to apply (film grain, LUT, filter adj).

6) Start the generation, sit down and relax... it may take several minutes to complete the generation (after all it's working on 9 images 1024x1024 at the same time).
